---
title: "debug_fishtest_phase2.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\debug_fishtest_phase2.py"
loc: 56
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.00
style_score: 3.80
intel_score: 5.69
overall_score: 3.71
---

## Intent
The `debug_fishtest_phase2.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on run_debug_phase2, FishtestDiagnostic, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via run_debug_phase2, FishtestDiagnostic, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 25 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `run_debug_phase2`
- `FishtestDiagnostic`
- `execute`
